ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., EUROPE, US) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the region (e.g., EU, US) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency used in the region (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Primary language of the region (e.g., en, de) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the size standard is applied */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the size standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the size standard is currently active */,
  "xs" INTEGER /* Size XS in the region's standard */,
  "s" INTEGER /* Size S in the region's standard */,
  "m" INTEGER /* Size M in the region's standard */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Size L in the region's standard */,
  "xl" INTEGER /* Size XL in the region's standard */,
  "xxl" INTEGER /* Size XXL in the region's standard */,
  "xxxl" INTEGER /* Size XXXL in the region's standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chest_measurements_inch" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest measurement record */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard to which the measurements belong */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurements */,
  "xs" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size XS in inches */,
  "s" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size S in inches */,
  "m" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size M in inches */,
  "l" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size L in inches */,
  "xl" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size XL in inches */,
  "xxl" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size XXL in inches */,
  "xxxl" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for size XXXL in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chest_measurements_inch_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chest_measurements_cm" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest measurement record */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard to which the measurements belong */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurements */,
  "xs" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size XS in centimeters */,
  "s" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size S in centimeters */,
  "m" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size M in centimeters */,
  "l" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size L in centimeters */,
  "xl" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size XL in centimeters */,
  "xxl" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size XXL in centimeters */,
  "xxxl" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for size XXXL in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chest_measurements_cm_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waist_measurements_inch" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waist measurement record */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard to which the measurements belong */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurements */,
  "xs" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size XS in inches */,
  "s" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size S in inches */,
  "m" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size M in inches */,
  "l" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size L in inches */,
  "xl" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size XL in inches */,
  "xxl" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size XXL in inches */,
  "xxxl" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for size XXXL in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waist_measurements_inch_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand associated with the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the size standard is applied */,
  "chest_inch" TEXT /* Chest fit measurement for the size in inches */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest fit measurement for the size in centimeters */,
  "waist_inch" TEXT /* Waist fit measurement for the size in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist fit measurement for the size in centimeters */,
  "hip_inch" TEXT /* Hip fit measurement for the size in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip fit measurement for the size in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_inch" TEXT /* Shoulder fit measurement for the size in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder fit measurement for the size in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement for the size in centimeters */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_waist_inch FOREIGN KEY ("waist_inch") REFERENCES waist_measurements_inch ("xs"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_chest_cm FOREIGN KEY ("chest_cm") REFERENCES chest_measurements_cm ("xs"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_waist_cm FOREIGN KEY ("waist_cm") REFERENCES waist_measurements_inch ("xs"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_chest_inch FOREIGN KEY ("chest_inch") REFERENCES chest_measurements_inch ("xs"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
